problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Stem. Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
